title: EnforcementDisposition
description: A resolved COIB enforcement action — the outcome of a conflicts-of-interest case, including the fine and any other penalty. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Enforcement Fines' dataset (p39r-nm7f, 13 columns), COIB's most-viewed asset. Keyed on Case Number.

caseNumber.description: COIB case number ('Case Number') — primary key.

caseName.description: Case caption ('Case Name'), typically the respondent public servant.

fineImposedNotPaid.description: 'Fine Imposed by COIB but not Paid'.

explanation.description: Narrative of the violation and penalty ('Explanation of COIB Fine').

threeWaySettlement.description: '3-Way Settlement' — settled jointly with the respondent's agency.
